html:
A Durian is a rare fruit food item. It can be cooked on a fire into an Extra Smelly Durian, and also used as an ingredient in Crock Pot recipes. Durians can be farmed from Farm Plots. Regular Seeds have a 5% chance of growing Durians. Durian Seeds can be gained by feeding a Durian to Birds in a Birdcage, which can produce 1–2 Durian Seeds as well as a 50% chance to get normal Seeds.

Like Monster Meat, raw Durian damages health and sanity, and also affects Crock Pot recipes. It can be used as a fruit/any filler in Crock Pot recipe with no toxic effects, but using more than 1 Durian in a Crock Pot recipe could result in Monster Lasagna unless the recipe contains Twigs or has higher priority.

Webber will still take the health and sanity penalties from eating Durians.

Extra Smelly Durian

Extra Smelly Durian is made by cooking a Durian. This cooked version does not damage health but one will still lose Sanity. It can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes.

It will still produce Monster Lasagna if more than one is included in the Crock Pot.

Usage

Tips

  • Turning Durian Fruit into seeds by feeding them to a bird then eating the seeds will provide more hunger than using 3-4 durian fruit in a crockpot recipe, at 9.375 hunger per seed when raw. On top of that, there is a chance of getting 2 seeds per fruit and an extra regular seed on top of that. While the crockpot recipes provide more health and sanity, this method is best for pure hunger and crop seeds have a rot timer of 40 days, which ties with regular Seeds and Honey for the longest time to rot for a foodstuff besides Powdercakes.
  • Wurt can eat Durians without the Sanity penalty and gain extra 23.25 hunger from them, which makes them great for her to eat.
  • Wurt benefits slightly more from Pumpkins despite the extra benefit from Durians. While Durians fill Wurt by 48.25 , a Pumpkin can fill Wurt by 50 , but having some in a crop plot for emergency rations is a good idea.
    • However, if Wurt were to be growing specific advanced Crop Seeds, the player should grow Dragonfruit. As Fruit Crockpot Meals receive her benefits to hunger, making a single Dragonpie worth 100 and 54 from each crop grown for the addition of 3 Twigs.

Trivia

  • The sanity loss, character quotes, and the name "Extra Smelly" refer to the foul odor that the real-life fruit can emit. Not all varieties of Durian have a foul odor, but it can be so pungent and linger for so long that Durians have been banned in some establishments and public transport. Known colloquially as the "King of Fruits", Durian is a creamy soft fruit.
  • Durian is a popular fruit in Thailand, Malaysia, Vietnam, Singapore, Indonesia, Myanmar, and the Philippines.
  • Using Durian to produce Monster Lasagna makes it theoretically possible to feed Wigfrid without meat.
  • Durians can theoretically be used for almost everything that Monster Meat is used for, besides some crockpot dishes and crafting, by cooking it into Monster Lasagna.

Gallery

  • Original HD Durian icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Original HD Durian Cooked icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"durian"
“Oh, it smells!”
–Wilson, when examining a Durian.
“Ew, stinky!”
–Willow, when examining a Durian.
“Is spiky smelly fruit.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Durian.
“Spiky and smelly!”
–Wendy, when examining a Durian.
“GOOD THING I LACK A NOSE”
–WX-78, when examining a Durian.
“Aha, the Durio zibethinus. It really does reek.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Durian.
“It smells bad.”
–Woodie, when examining a Durian.
“It's an acquired taste.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Durian.
“Not anything I want to experiment with eating.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Durian.
“Smells like my battle bööts.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Durian.
“Pungent.”
–Webber, when examining a Durian.
“Looks pretty difficult to eat.”
–Walani, when examining a Durian.
“That odor...”
–Warly, when examining a Durian.
“Thet does ney smell like food!”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Durian.
“IT SMELL NAUGHT AS SWEET”
–Wilba, when examining a Durian.
“Smelly belly stuff”
–Wormwood, when examining a Durian.
“What an adventurous smell I've discovered!”
–Wheeler, when examining a Durian.
“Powerful stench! I respect that.”
–Winona, when examining a Durian.
“I love a good stink!”
–Wortox, when examining a Durian.
“Mmm... smell a bit like swamp!”
–Wurt, when examining a Durian.
“Yuck! What is that?”
–Walter, when examining a Durian.
“I could never forget a smell like that.”
–Wanda, when examining a Durian.
A Durian is a rare fruit food item.
It can be cooked on a fire into an Extra Smelly Durian, and also used as an ingredient in Crock Pot recipes.
Durians can be farmed from Farm Plots. Regular Seeds have a 5% chance of growing Durians. Durian Seeds can be gained by feeding a Durian to Birds in a Birdcage, which can produce 1–2 Durian Seeds as well as a 50% chance to get normal Seeds.
Like Monster Meat, raw Durian damages health and sanity, and also affects Crock Pot recipes. It can be used as a fruit/any filler in Crock Pot recipe with no toxic effects, but using more than 1 Durian in a Crock Pot recipe could result in Monster Lasagna unless the recipe contains Twigs or has higher priority.
Webber will still take the health and sanity penalties from eating Durians.
Extra Smelly Durian[edit | edit source]
Extra Smelly Durian
Food Info
25
0
-5
Veggie
× 1 × 1
Object Info
6 days
Can be Burned
40
Miscellaneous
"durian_cooked"
“Now it smells even worse!”
–Wilson, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Yuck, it smells just as bad cooked!”
–Willow, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Now is hot spiky smelly fruit.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Less spiky, but even smellier!”
–Wendy, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“STILL NOT GOOD”
–WX-78, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Cooking this certainly did not improve its odor.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“It smells even worse.”
–Woodie, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“A little more refined, at least.”
–Maxwell, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“A consumable psychic attack!”
–Wagstaff, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Why did I cöök this again?”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“No sir, I don't like it.”
–Webber, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Woah! That smells awful!”
–Walani, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Could use onions and chili...”
–Warly, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Cookin' it up don't make it better.”
–Woodlegs, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“'TIS FWOOSH'DED STINK FRUITS”
–Wilba, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Still smells”
–Wormwood, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“I'm going to launch this as far away from me as possible.”
–Wheeler, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Whew! That'll put some hair on your hair.”
–Winona, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Don't mind if I do-rian.”
–Wortox, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“Has good stink to it!”
–Wurt, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“No thank you.”
–Walter, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.
“It tastes better than it smells, but that's not saying much.”
–Wanda, when examining an Extra Smelly Durian.

A '''Durian''' is a rare [[fruit]] [[food]] [[item]].
It can be [[Cooking|cooked]] on a [[fire]] into an Extra Smelly Durian, and also used as an ingredient in [[Crock Pot]] recipes. 
Durians can be [[Farming|farmed]] from [[Farm Plot]]s. Regular [[Seeds]] have a 5% chance of growing Durians. [[Durian Seeds]] can be gained by feeding a Durian to [[Birds]] in a [[Birdcage]], which can produce 1–2 Durian Seeds as well as a 50% chance to get normal Seeds. 

Like [[Monster Meat]], raw Durian damages [[health]] and [[sanity]], and also affects Crock Pot recipes. It can be used as a fruit/any filler in Crock Pot recipe with no toxic effects, but using more than 1 Durian in a Crock Pot recipe could result in [[Monster Lasagna]] unless the recipe contains [[Twigs]] or has higher priority. 

[[Webber]] will still take the health and sanity penalties from eating Durians.

'''Extra Smelly Durian''' is made by [[cooking]] a Durian. This cooked version does not damage [[health]] but one will still lose [[Sanity]]. It can be used as an ingredient in several [[Crock Pot]] recipes.

It will still produce Monster Lasagna if more than one is included in the Crock Pot.

{{clear}}
== {{Pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item = durian
|result = Extra Smelly Durian
|fire = yes
}}
{{Recipe
|item = Durian
|result = Durian Seeds
|bird = yes
}}
{{Recipe
|item = Durians
|result = Manure
|manure = yes
}}{{Recipe
|item = Durians
|result = Fruit Medley
|item2=Durians|item3=Durians|item4=Twigs|pot=Crockpot}}

== {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Turning Durian Fruit into seeds by feeding them to a bird then eating the seeds will provide more hunger than using 3-4 durian fruit in a crockpot recipe, at 9.375 hunger per seed when raw. On top of that, there is a chance of getting 2 seeds per fruit and an extra regular seed on top of that. While the crockpot recipes provide more health and sanity, this method is best for pure hunger and crop seeds have a rot timer of 40 days, which ties with regular Seeds and Honey for the longest time to rot for a foodstuff besides Powdercakes.
*Wurt can eat Durians without the Sanity penalty and gain extra 23.25 hunger from them, which makes them great for her to eat.
* Wurt benefits slightly more from [[Pumpkin]]s despite the extra benefit from Durians. While Durians fill Wurt by 48.25 {{hunger}}, a Pumpkin can fill Wurt by 50 {{hunger}}, but having some in a crop plot for emergency rations is a good idea.
** However, if Wurt were to be growing specific advanced [[Crop Seeds]], the player should grow Dragonfruit. As Fruit Crockpot Meals receive her benefits to hunger, making a single Dragonpie worth 100 {{hunger}} and 54 {{Hp}} from each crop grown for the addition of 3 Twigs.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The sanity loss, character quotes, and the name "Extra Smelly" refer to the foul odor that the real-life fruit can emit. Not all varieties of [[Wikipedia:Durian|Durian]] have a foul odor, but it can be so pungent and linger for so long that Durians have been banned in some establishments and public transport. Known colloquially as the "King of Fruits", Durian is a creamy soft fruit.
* Durian is a popular fruit in Thailand, Malaysia, Vietnam, Singapore, Indonesia, Myanmar, and the Philippines.
* Using Durian to produce Monster Lasagna makes it theoretically possible to feed [[Wigfrid]] without meat.
*Durians can theoretically be used for almost everything that Monster Meat is used for, besides some crockpot dishes and crafting, by cooking it into Monster Lasagna.
